zh.lifeSummary: Cicely Upchurch是Wilmar Upchurch和Mrs Wilmar Upchurch的女兒，於1135年出生在英國肯特易斯爾 本 謝坡。她於1162年與Ulf Haroldson of Wessex結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1190年在英國肯特享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cicely Upchurch是Wilmar Upchurch和Mrs Wilmar Upchurch的女儿，于1135年出生在英国肯特易斯爾 本 謝坡。她于1162年与Ulf Haroldson of Wessex结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1190年在英国肯特享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Upchurch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place called as ‘the high church’ or possibly the higher of two churches, from Middle English up ‘up, high, higher’ + chirche ‘church’ (Old English upp + cirice). There is a village of this name in Kent, near Chatham, but the geographical distribution of the surname suggests its origin is in Huntingdonshire or Cambridgeshire.

nameMeanings.name: Cicely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

variants.name: Cecily
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

en.lifeSummary: Cicely Upchurch was born in 1135, in Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England as the daughter of Wilmar Upchurch and Mrs Wilmar Upchurch. She married Ulf Haroldson of Wessex in 1162. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1190, in Kent, England, at the age of 55.

ko.lifeSummary: Cicely Upchurch(은)는 1135년 영국 켄트 이슬일 프 셰피에서 Wilmar Upchurch(와)과 Mrs Wilmar Upchurch의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1162년 Ulf Haroldson of Wessex(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1190년 영국 켄트에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Minster In Sheppey,Kent,England: минстир ин шеппи, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Cicely Upchurch родилась в 1135 г. в местности исл оф шеппи, кэнт, Англия. Её родителей звали Wilmar Upchurch и Mrs Wilmar Upchurch. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ulf Haroldson of Wessex в 1162 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1190 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.
